chunks.text: PHASE-2 BOOTCAMP 6-day immersive residential program designed to enable participants to deeply understand domain-specific challenges, build strong teams, and initiate problem-solving journeys. The bootcamp integrates:  Sectoral exposure  Field immersion  Problem identification & validation  Team building  Entrepreneurial mindset development Participants will be provided with accommodation and meals (breakfast, lunch, dinner) throughout the program. Focused Sectors The bootcamp is organized across the following key sectors:  Agriculture & Horticulture  Rural Livelihoods & MSMEs  Gram Panchayat (Local Governance s Public Services)  Rural Healthcare- Animal & Human  Rural E-commerce & Market Access Each center will be aligned with a specific sector focus to ensure depth and contextual learning. Bootcamp Centers The program will be conducted across the following centers:  Belagavi  Kalaburagi (Gulbarga)  Davangere  Mysuru  Bengaluru (Muddenhalli) Each location will host a sector-specific cohort (e.g., Health in Belagavi, Rural Livelihoods & MSMEs in Mysuru).

Detailed 6-Day Agenda Day 1: Onboarding & Team Formation Focus: Orientation, bonding, and empathy building Agenda:  Participant Enrollment & Registration  Ice-breaker & Team Introduction Activities  Team Building Exercises (Afternoon)  Bootcamp Orientation & Expectations  Empathy Session (Evening) o Understanding users o Introduction to real-world problems Day 1: Onboarding & Team Formation Objective: Build comfort, alignment, and team bonding Time Activity 08:00 – 10:00 AM Registration & Enrollment 10:00 – 11:00 AM Welcome & Bootcamp Overview 11:00 – 01:00 PM Ice-breakers & Participant Introductions 01:00 – 02:00 PM Lunch 02:00 – 04:30 PM Team Formation & Team Building Activities 04:30 – 05:30 PM Break / Informal Interaction 05:30 – 06:00 PM Tea Break 06:00 – 08:00 PM Empathy Bootcamp Session (Understanding Users) 08:00 – 09:00 PM Dinner 09:00 – 10:30 PM Team Reflection & Informal Bonding Day 2: Sector Deep Dive & Problem Definition Focus: Domain understanding and problem framing Agenda:  Morning Yoga Session  Expert Talk (2 Hours) o Sector-specific insights o Industry challenges  Problem Identification Workshop o Understanding problems vs solutions o

M Field Visit (Validation of Problem Statements) 05:30 – 06:00 PM Tea Break 06:00 – 08:30 PM Team Work (Refining Problem Statements) 08:30 – 09:30 PM Dinner 09:30 – 11:00 PM Validation Insights Consolidation Day 5: Recreation & Team Strengthening Focus: Relaxation and bonding Agenda:  One-Day Recreational Trip o Local tourist or nature destination o Informal team bonding  Reflection & Informal Discussions Day 5: Recreation & Team Strengthening Objective: Refresh, bond, and recharge Time Activity 07:00 – 08:00 AM Light Activity / Preparation 08:00 – 09:00 AM Breakfast 09:00 AM – 06:00 PM One-Day Recreational Trip 01:00 – 02:00 PM Lunch (During Trip) 06:00 – 07:00 PM Return & Rest 07:00 – 08:30 PM Informal Sharing / Fun Activities 08:30 – 09:30 PM Dinner 09:30 – 10:30 PM Team Bonding Day 6: Synthesis & Future Roadmap Focus: Consolidation and next steps Agenda:  Recap of Learnings from Past 5 Days  Team Presentations o Problem statements o Key insights  Roadmap Planning (Next 2 Months) o Action items o Milestones  Feedback & Closing Ceremony Day 6: Consolidation & Roadmap Planning Objective: Convert learning into action Time Activity 07:00 – 08:00 AM Light Activity 08:00 – 09:00 AM Breakfast 09:00 – 11:00 AM Recap of Learnings 11:00 – 01:00 PM Team Presentations 01:00 – 02:00 PM Lunch 02:00 – 04:30 PM Roadmap Planning (Next 2 Months) 04:30 – 05:00 PM Tea Break 05:00 – 06:30

tivity 08:00 – 09:00 AM Breakfast 09:00 – 11:00 AM Recap of Learnings 11:00 – 01:00 PM Team Presentations 01:00 – 02:00 PM Lunch 02:00 – 04:30 PM Roadmap Planning (Next 2 Months) 04:30 – 05:00 PM Tea Break 05:00 – 06:30 PM Feedback & Closing Ceremony 06:30 PM onwards Departure Expected Outcomes By the end of the bootcamp, participants will:  Gain first-hand sector exposure  Develop validated insights from the field  Build strong team collaboration  Create a 2-month execution roadmap
